traits.t: Mothiva can call upon Zasp to perform attacks independently.

pros.p: Meterless combos off of her reversal and corner throw.
Zasp provides safe ways to attack and pressure opponents.

normals.name: {{ n5 }}{{ A }}
normals.description: Stomps at your feet. A standing low.

normals.name: {{ n5 }}{{ B }}
normals.description: Straight kick forwards. Good for poking over low-aiming moves.

normals.name: {{ n5 }}{{ C }}
normals.description: Steps forward with a roundhouse kick.

normals.name: {{ n2 }}{{ A }}
normals.description:
Quick low kick.
More range than {{ n5 }}{{ A }}.

normals.name: {{ j }}{{ C }}
normals.description:
Aerial somersault kick.
Charged version floats you upwards slightly and Launches the opponent much higher.

commands.name: {{ n4 }}{{ B }}{{ B }}
commands.description:
After {{ n4 }}{{ B }}, Mothiva drops her leg on the opponent in an axe kick.
If you hold {{ B }}, she'll fake out the opponent and trip them up instead.
Can be done even if {{ n4 }}{{ B }} whiffs.

commands.name: {{ n3 }}{{ C }}
commands.description:
Hops slightly and kicks. Goes over low-aiming moves.
Doesn't chain into other normals. Cancels into Skills only on hit.

commands.name: {{ j }}{{ n2 }}{{ C }}
commands.description:
Downwards axe kick.
Stops your upwards momentum.

throws.name: Ground throw
throws.description:
Knees the opponent in the gut and then punts them away.
In the corner, the Wallbounce lets you combo for free.

throws.name: Air throw
throws.input: {{ d4 }}{{ A }}+{{ D }} or {{ d6 }}{{ A }}+{{ D }} while airborne
throws.description:
Grabs the opponent and gives 'em a good slapping.
You can take advantage of the Groundslide in the corner for a free combo.

skills.name: Get 'em, Zasp!
skills.description:
Mothiva calls on Zasp to attack. You can Chain Cancel very early in the startup and Zasp will still appear.
{{ d5 }}{{ S }}: Zasp does a moonsault kick that arcs downwards. It tracks to the opponent's position to some extent. In the air, Zasp always spawns at Mothiva's location.
{{ d6 }}{{ S }} or {{ d4 }}{{ S }}: Zasp darts in with a flying kick that travels fullscreen. The direction Zasp enters the screen and knocks the opponent is the same as the direction you press.
Other Skills can be canceled into a Zasp call.
Zasp will stop attacking if Mothiva is hit before Zasp can land a hit, or if Zasp himself is hit by an attack or projectile.

skills.name: Backstage Pass
skills.description:
Zasp appears behind the opponent and tries to grab them. On a successful grab, Zasp kicks the opponent across the ground towards Mothiva.
When done in a combo, the startup is much faster and aerial opponents can also be grabbed.
Unlike the other Zasp specials, this one can’t be chain Canceled on startup, so whiffing it leaves you very vulnerable.

skills.name: Siren Song
skills.description:
Mothiva sings out a music note.
Uncharged, the music note slowly accelerates forwards and slightly tracks the vertical location of the opponent. In the air, it'll start off aiming diagonally downwards.
Charged, the note expands and drops to the ground near Mothiva and bursts.

skills.name: {{ n236 }}{{ B }}
skills.description:
Mothiva screeches into a mic. Pretty fast startup.
Has long hitstun and blockstun and hits in a radius around Mothiva.
Safe on block, and can be plus when done meaty.
Also a useful tool in some combos.

skills.name: {{ n236 }}{{ C }}
skills.description:
Mothiva does a rising somersault kick.
On hit, she does an additional kick that knocks the opponent down.
Unlike other Skills, this only cancels to {{ S }} (Get 'em, Zasp!) on hit, so you can't try to save yourself for (mostly) free by doing that.

skills.name: -
skills.description:
{{ d214 }}{{ A }}: A hopping knee. It's always safe on block, and can be spaced to be plus. It can be canceled into {{ n214 }}{{ C }} by pressing {{ d4 }}{{ C }}.
You can combo afterwards with a counterhit or in juggle.
{{ d214 }}{{ B }} version is a flying knee, kick, then axe kick. It's projectile invincible, and the last hit is a high. It's safe on block unless Super Blocked.

skills.name: {{ n214 }}{{ C }}
skills.description:
Mothiva leaps about 3/4-screen with a flying kick. It's minus up close, but you can space it to be plus on block. It's a useful tool for getting in, especially with a Zasp call.
Critical Counter on counterhit.

exs.name: -
exs.description:
Mothiva does a large upwards spinning kick that hits multiple times. On hit, ends with the usual downwards kick to spike the opponent back to the ground.
Can be canceled into a Zasp call before the last hit.

exs.name: {{ n214 }}{{ A }}{{ B }}
exs.description:
Zasp appears and does three attacks in succession.
The first attack is ---.
The attacks happen in a more staggered fashion on block than on hit.
